Friend: Hey! We're heading out to the mall. You coming?
Come on, you need to get out. You've been stuck here all week.

1: I can't right now, I'm busy with some things at home.

1.Friend: Oh... okay. Maybe another time then.
They exchange glances. You can tell they don't really understand.

1.Player: They don't need to know. It's easier this way.

2: I really wish I could, but I'm just not up for it today.

2.Friend: That's okay. We get it. Take care of yourself.
They smile sympathetically before heading out.

2.Player: I'm just exhausted. I don't have it in me right now.
